financialImpact.notes: Based on FTE hours reduced x loaded rate

define.problemStatement: Invoice processing currently takes an average of 9.4 days from receipt to payment approval, causing late payment penalties and strained supplier relationships.
define.goalStatement: Reduce average invoice processing cycle time from 9.4 days to under 3 days by Q3 2026, without increasing headcount.

inScope: Accounts Payable invoice intake through approval

define.businessCase: Late payment penalties cost approximately $140K annually and are damaging key supplier relationships. Reducing cycle time also frees up 1.5 FTE of rework capacity.

dataCollectionPlan.operationalDefinition: Business days from invoice receipt timestamp to approval timestamp in ERP
Number of times an invoice is handled by a person before approval

measure.notes: Baseline sample pulled from a random 200-invoice sample across all vendor categories in March 2026.

causes: ERP requires manual data entry for non-EDI invoices
Single approver bottleneck for invoices over $5K
No visibility into invoice aging until overdue
Approvers often traveling, no mobile approval option

whys: Approval is waiting on a single manager
That manager has no backup approver
The approval workflow was never configured with a delegate
The workflow was set up ad hoc without a formal RACI
There was no standard onboarding checklist for new approval workflows

analyze.findings: The top three causes (missing PO numbers, single-approver bottlenecks, and manual data entry errors) account for over 75% of delays, matching the Pareto principle and pointing to fixable process/design issues rather than volume or staffing constraints.

solutions.description: Required PO number field enforced at invoice intake (email parsing + web portal validation)
Added delegate approver rules and mobile approval capability
Enabled OCR-based data capture for non-EDI invoices to reduce manual entry

pilotResults.summary: 30-day pilot across the Finance and Ops vendor categories showed a 67% reduction in cycle time with no increase in rework rate.

controlPlan.responseIfOutOfControl: Escalate to Process Owner; review exception queue within 24 hours
Notify vendor management to follow up with offending supplier

finalResults.summary: Full rollout sustained a 2.7-day average cycle time over the 90 days following implementation, exceeding the 3-day goal.
